skills.title: ForgeUI
skills.description: Developer-first dark app design system. High-contrast IDE aesthetic with pastel accent cards, bento grids, and seamless light/dark mode toggling.

skills.title: Aegis Glow
skills.description: Obsidian Glow Fintech UI. Luxurious metallic financial interfaces with cinematic copper lighting, glassmorphic cards, and dual-theme parity.

skills.title: Ecovolt
skills.description: Eco-Brutalist Clean Tech design. Stark architectural typography meets organic softness with neon lime accents and floating glassmorphic overlays.

skills.title: Nova AI
skills.description: Radiant Soft-Glass AI design. Airy SaaS interfaces with sunburst gradients, floating 3D glassmorphic cards, and warm AI Spark accents.

skills.title: Big Shaped
skills.description: Big Shaped design system. Stark architectural typography meets organic softness with neon lime accents and floating glassmorphic overlays.
